props.name: ariaLive
props.description: Indicates how assistive technology should handle updates to the live region.

props.name: compact
props.description: When true, reduces padding for a more compact notification.

props.name: emphasis
props.description: Sets the visual prominence. 'high' for full background, 'low' for a bordered style.

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Define the context and colour of the notification.

events.name: onDismiss
events.description: Callback fired when the notification is dismissed.
